Home › FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about SendAFun before or after sending a card. If your question isn't here, our team replies to every email within 24 hours, 7 days a week.

💳 Pricing & Billing (6) ✉️ Delivery & Scheduling (5) 🔒 Privacy & Data (4) 🎴 Editor & Templates (5)

All Questions

Is SendAFun actually free?

Yes, 100%. Every card on SendAFun is free to design, personalise with text, and send. No paywalls, no hidden subscription, no credit card required to use the core product.

Do I need an account to send a card?

Nope! You can design, preview, and send any card in 30 seconds without signing up. We only ask for an email address if you want to save your in-progress edits or schedule a future delivery.

How do I schedule a card to be sent later?

After designing any card, go to the Send screen and toggle the "Send later" option. Pick any date and time up to 365 days in the future. We'll send it automatically — no extra charge.

Can I send a card to multiple recipients at once?

Each card is individually addressed so the recipient sees their own name on it. You can send the same design to up to 200 emails at once, or use our CSV import option for larger lists.

What file format are the background images?

All card backgrounds are JPG images served from our Cloudflare R2 public bucket, optimised for fast loading on mobile and desktop. All images are royalty-free and licensed for commercial & personal use in our cards.

Can I upload my OWN photo as the card background?

Coming soon! Q3 2026 we will launch the "upload your own image" feature so you can turn baby photos, wedding photos, and group selfies into cards in 1 click.

Are my card messages private?

Absolutely. The text you write in a card is encrypted in transit (HTTPS/TLS) and stored encrypted at rest. We never read, share, or sell the personal messages you write.

How do I delete my card data?

Under GDPR/CCPA, you have the right to permanent deletion. Email privacy@sendafun.com with the email you used to schedule the card and we will delete ALL associated data within 14 days.

Can I print the card to send by post?

Yes! Every card has a "Download PDF" button — click it to get a high-resolution (300 DPI) PDF you can print at home or at any print shop. Perfect for people who love physical mail.

Do you add your branding to the delivered card?

Only a tiny "Sent via SendAFun" link in the footer of the email. It's intentionally subtle; the focus is on YOUR message, not our logo.

What email address do cards come from?

Cards are delivered from hello@mg.sendafun.com via Resend, our email delivery partner. Tell recipients to add us to their contacts so cards don't land in spam.

The card went to spam — what now?

First, ask the recipient to check their Promotions / Spam folder and mark it "Not spam". Then tell them to add hello@mg.sendafun.com as a contact. For critical cards, try scheduling a resend 24 hours before the event.

Can I use SendAFun for business / work cards?

Of course! Thousands of teams use SendAFun for birthday cards, work anniversaries, onboarding welcome packs, and client thank-yous. Email enterprise@sendafun.com for bulk pricing and SSO.

Is there a SendAFun app for iOS or Android?

Not yet. Our mobile website works perfectly offline for designing — and we save your draft locally. Native apps are on the roadmap for late 2026.

What languages do you support?

Card UI is in English, but you can write messages in ANY language. Our editor renders RTL, CJK, Cyrillic, emoji, and everything in-between. Send in Spanish, Arabic, Mandarin — no limits.

How do I report an inappropriate card or copyright issue?

Email takedown@sendafun.com with the exact URL and reason. We respond within 24 hours, including DMCA counter-notice procedures.

Does SendAFun run ads?

We display non-intrusive Google AdSense ads on some secondary pages (category lists, blog posts) to keep the core card product free. No ads inside the card editor or on delivered cards — ever.

Can I cancel a scheduled card?

Yes, up to 1 hour before the scheduled send time. Click the "Cancel scheduled send" link in your confirmation email, or email support@sendafun.com with the scheduled ID.

I forgot my password — what next?

Click "Sign in" → "Forgot password". We send a one-time magic link to your email (no password reset questions!). Magic links expire after 15 minutes for security.

How do I suggest a new card category or feature?

We read every suggestion personally! Use the form on the Contact page, or tweet us @SendAFun with the hashtag #SendAFunWishlist. Top ideas get shipped free.

Still have a question?

We read every email personally. 90% of tickets get a reply in under 4 hours during UK business hours.

→ Contact our team

🍪 We use cookies
Essential cookies keep the card editor working. Analytics and advertising cookies help us improve the site and show relevant ads, and are only set after you accept. Read the Privacy Policy or Cookie Policy for details.
